ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework/library used to develop the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Training loss of the model */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Step number */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metric_types table */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., plot, chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the metric_types table */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value */,
  "comparison_operator" TEXT /* Comparison operator (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_shares" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the models table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
